title: Viewport
description: Viewport: A wrapper BHoM type for Revit viewport, used to create or update Revit viewports (on Push) and represent them as BHoMObjects (on Pull).

InstanceProperties.description: An entity storing the information about Revit viewport type. InstanceProperties: A generic wrapper BHoM type corresponding to any Revit family type. Name of InstanceProperties corresponds to family type name, type parameter values are stored in RevitParametersToPush.

Location.description: Location of the viewport in Revit sheet space. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

SheetNumber.description: Number of the Revit sheet hosting the Viewport.

ViewName.description: Name of the Revit view shown in the Viewport.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
